description_long: This is a small bird with a slender, streamlined body and a long, pointed beak. Its plumage is primarily a mix of soft gray and white tones, with subtle brownish hues on the head and back. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and tapers to a point. The legs are thin and pale, almost blending with the lighter underparts. The bird's overall appearance suggests it is adapted for agile flight and foraging in urban or park environments.
description: A small, slender bird with gray and white plumage, a pointed beak, and a long, tapered tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, pointed beak, and long tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow body and folded wings, with the tail feathers visible at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the bird.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the pale underparts and the thin legs extending from the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray upperparts with lighter, almost white underparts and subtle brownish shading on the head and back
